title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.350 - Director to deliver papers and property to successor
text:
8.350.  Director to deliver papers and property to successor. — The director of the division of facilities management, design and construction shall deliver to his or her successor all property and papers of every kind in his or her possession, relative to the affairs of state, make an inventory thereof, upon which he or she shall take a receipt of his or her successor, and deliver the same to the secretary of state.
(L. 1958 2d Ex. Sess. p. 183 § 10, A.L. 1965 p. 126, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
